release.action:
Features

  • Bindex core: generate and register Bindex metadata with CLI support (create/update/search), including layered picking and integration-aware search.
  • Project layout support: detect and process Maven, JavaScript, Python and Gradle project structures; handle recursive sub-modules and parent projects.
  • Vector/semantic search: classification- and description-based embeddings with score thresholds and configurable limits; improved result output and filtering (language/domains/integrations).
  • Assembly workflows: added “assembly” command and prompt generation (assemble.txt / project.txt), plus tooling and defaults for assembly prompting.
  • GenAI integration: pluggable providers/adapters (OpenAI-compatible and others), function tools (REST/web/system/terminate), and configurable request timeouts and limits.
  • Ghostwriter (GW): file processing and review automation with guidance/instructions support, multi-threaded module processing, and Act-based workflows with TOML templates.
  • Maven plugins: introduced bindex-maven-plugin, assembly-maven-plugin, and gw-maven-plugin with goals/options for non-interactive runs and configuration via properties.
  • Packaging & distribution: delivery pack creation and improved build profiles; added site docs, diagrams and assets.

Fixes

  • Stabilized scanning/root directory handling and related-path resolution across CLI and Maven plugin runs.
  • Improved prompt/template processing (guidance handling, markdown formatting edge cases, prompt substitutions and line ending normalization).
  • Hardened function tool execution: better command denylist checks, safer command execution, and improved error handling for multi-call and configuration initialization.
  • Resolved provider/runtime issues (OpenAI BadRequest follow-ups, token refresh, timeouts, NPEs, logging and configuration defaults).
  • Fixed bindex generation/schema issues (required fields, JS/Python builders, temp/debug location under .machai).

Refactoring

  • Extracted and reorganized modules and interfaces (project-layout module, GenAIProvider/Adapter abstractions, shared processor logic, function tools discovery via ServiceLoader).
  • Renamed and normalized options/properties and package/module names (e.g., ghostwriter to gw, property prefixes, goal naming).
  • Cleaned up dependencies/build configuration and improved import organization and logging consistency.

Documentation

  • Expanded README and site documentation, including CLI/plugin usage, Act templates, processing guides, and additional pages/assets.
  • Added and improved Javadoc across modules; updated diagrams and screenshots.

Chores

  • Versioning and release metadata updates; added release-related POM tags and build tooling updates.
  • Added tests and test resources; adjusted defaults for compatibility (Java 8/9/11 where applicable).
  • Security maintenance fixes (Grype-reported issues and command/tooling hardening).
